# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

serve(async (req) => {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const userId = url.searchParams.get("userId");
    const filterParam = url.searchParams.get("filterParam");

    if (!userId) {
        return new Response("User ID is required", { status: 400 });
    }

    const key = ['users', userId, filterParam];
    const entry = await kv.get(key);

    if (entry === null) {
        return new Response("No data found", { status: 404 });
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify(entry.value), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
});
